---
title: Skills
toc: false
sidebar: false
page-layout: full
body-classes: "gd-skills-page"
---

A skill is a package of structured files that teaches an AI coding agent how to work with a specific tool or framework. The skill below was generated by Great Docs from this project's documentation. Install it in your agent and it will be able to run commands, edit configuration, write content, and troubleshoot problems without step-by-step guidance from you.

```{=html}
<div class="gd-skills-install">
  <button class="gd-skills-install-toggle" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="gd-skills-install-body">
    <span class="gd-skills-install-icon">&#9654;</span>    Install this skill
  </button>
  <div class="gd-skills-install-body" id="gd-skills-install-body">
    <div class="gd-skills-install-inner">
      <div class="gd-skills-install-pad">
```

**Any agent** --- install with [npx](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills):

```{=html}
<div class="sourceCode"><pre class="sourceCode bash code-with-copy" style="padding-bottom: 0;"><code>npx skills add https://yasyf.github.io/cc-orchestrate/</code></pre></div>
```

**Codex / OpenCode**

```{=html}
<div class="sourceCode"><pre class="sourceCode text code-with-copy" style="padding-bottom: 0;"><code>Tell the agent:<br>Fetch the skill file at https://yasyf.github.io/cc-orchestrate/skill.md and follow the instructions.</code></pre></div>
```

**Manual** --- download the skill file:

```{=html}
<div class="sourceCode"><pre class="sourceCode bash code-with-copy" style="padding-bottom: 0;"><code>curl -O https://yasyf.github.io/cc-orchestrate/skill.md</code></pre></div>
```

```{=html}
<p>Or browse the <a href="skill.md" class="gd-raw-link"><code>SKILL.md</code></a> file.</p>
```

```{=html}
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  var btn = document.querySelector('.gd-skills-install-toggle');
  var body = document.getElementById('gd-skills-install-body');
  if (!btn || !body) return;
  btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    var open = body.classList.toggle('gd-skills-install-open');
    btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', open);
  });
})();
</script>
```

```{=html}
<h3 class="gd-skills-file-heading">SKILL.md</h3>
<pre class="gd-skills-raw">
```

````markdown
---
name: package
description: >
  Orchestrate fleets of Claude Code agents across pluggable backends like cmux and superset.
license: PolyForm-Noncommercial-1.0.0
compatibility: Requires Python >=3.13.
---

# cc-orchestrate

Orchestrate fleets of Claude Code agents across pluggable backends like cmux and superset.

## Resources

- [Full documentation](https://yasyf.github.io/cc-orchestrate/)
- [llms.txt](llms.txt) — Indexed API reference for LLMs
- [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt) — Comprehensive documentation for LLMs
- [Source code](https://github.com/yasyf/cc-orchestrate)
````

```{=html}
</pre>
```
